heading: Insurance of additional mortgages
label: 1750g Insurance of additional mortgages

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: In addition to mortgages insured under , the Secretary is authorized to insure mortgages as defined in (including advances on such mortgages during construction) which are eligible for insurance as hereinafter provided.section 1750b of this titlesection 1750 of this title

children.heading: Eligibility requirements; release of part of property
children.label: b Eligibility requirements; release of part of property

children.text: The mortgaged property shall be held by a mortgagor approved by the Secretary. The Secretary may, in his discretion, require such mortgagor to be regulated or restricted as to rents or sales, charges, capital structure, rate of return, and methods of operation. The Secretary may make such contracts with, and acquire for not to exceed $100 stock or interest in any such mortgagor, as the Secretary may deem necessary to render effective such restriction or regulation. Such stock or interest shall be paid for out of the General Insurance Fund, and shall be redeemed by the mortgagor at par upon the termination of all obligations of the Secretary under the insurance.

children.label: B
children.text: not to exceed 90 per centum of the amount which the Secretary estimates will be the value of the property or project when the proposed improvements are completed: , That such mortgage shall not in any event exceed the amount which the Secretary estimates will be the cost of the completed physical improvements on the property or project exclusive of off-site public utilities and streets and organization and legal expenses; andProvided

children.label: C
children.text: not to exceed $8,100 per family unit (or $7,200 per family unit if the number of rooms in such property or project does not equal or exceed four per family unit) for such part of such property or project as may be attributable to dwelling use: , That the Secretary may by regulation increase such dollar amount limitations by not exceeding $900 in any geographical area where he finds that cost levels so require.Provided
The mortgagor shall enter into the agreement required by .section 1715r of this title

children.heading: Default; debentures; cash adjustment; certificate of claim
children.label: c Default; debentures; cash adjustment; certificate of claim
children.text: The mortgagee shall be entitled to receive debentures in connection with mortgages insured under this section in the amount and under the conditions specified in subsection (g) of , and the references in said subsection (g) to the cash adjustment provided for in subsection (j) of section 1713 and to the certificate of claim provided for in subsection (h) of section 1713 shall be deemed to refer respectively to the cash adjustment provided for in subsection (c) of and to the certificate of claim provided for in subsection (d) of this section.section 1713 of this titlesection 1750c of this title

children.heading: Certificate of claim; contents and payment
children.label: d Certificate of claim; contents and payment
children.text: The certificate of claim issued by the Secretary to any mortgagee under this section shall be for an amount determined in accordance with, and shall contain provisions and shall be paid in accordance with, the provisions of .section 1713(h) of this title

children.heading: Debentures; issuance and payment in accordance with section 1750c(c), (d) of this title
children.label: e Debentures; issuance and payment in accordance with section 1750c(c), (d) of this title
children.text: Debentures issued under this section shall be issued in accordance with the provisions of section 1750c(c) and (d) of this title except that such debentures shall be dated as of the date of default as determined in subsection (c) of this section, and shall bear interest from such date.

children.heading: Applicability of section 1713(k), (l) of this title
children.label: f Applicability of section 1713(k), (l) of this title
children.text: The provisions of section 1713(k) and () of this title shall be applicable to mortgages insured under this section and to property acquired by the Secretary hereunder, except that, as applied to such mortgages and property, the reference therein to subsection (g) shall be construed to refer to subsection (c) of this section.l

children.heading: Applications under section 1743; credit for fees upon reapplication under this section
children.label: g Applications under section 1743; credit for fees upon reapplication under this section
children.text: In any case where an application for insurance under was received by the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development on or before , and has not been rejected or committed upon, the mortgagee upon reapplication for insurance of a mortgage under this section with respect to the same property shall receive credit for any application fees paid in connection with the prior application: , That this subsection shall not constitute a waiver of any requirements otherwise applicable to the insurance of mortgages under this section.section 1743 of this titleMarch 1, 1950Provided

children.heading: Preferences
children.label: h Preferences
children.text: The Secretary shall grant preference to applications for insurance under this subchapter to mortgages covering housing of lower rents.
